inputs.label: Filter Order (n)
inputs.businessContext: Order of the Butterworth filter (positive integer). Higher order gives steeper roll-off.

businessContext_i18n.en: Order of the Butterworth filter (positive integer). Higher order gives steeper roll-off.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Butterworth filtresinin derecesi (pozitif tam sayı). Yüksek derece daha dik geçiş sağlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ordnung des Butterworth-Filters (positive ganze Zahl). Höhere Ordnung ergibt steileren Abfall.

inputs.label: Frequency of Interest
inputs.businessContext: Frequency at which to evaluate the filter response.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency at which to evaluate the filter response.
businessContext_i18n.de: Frequenz, bei der die Filterantwort ausgewertet wird.

inputs.label: Passband Gain
inputs.businessContext: Linear gain in the passband (for active filters). Typically 1 for unity-gain Sallen-Key.

businessContext_i18n.en: Linear gain in the passband (for active filters). Typically 1 for unity-gain Sallen-Key.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçiş bandındaki doğrusal kazanç (aktif filtreler için). Sallen-Key birim kazanç için tipik olarak 1.
businessContext_i18n.de: Lineare Verstärkung im Durchlassbereich (für aktive Filter). Typischerweise 1 für Sallen-Key mit Einheitsverstärkung.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
